name: Lisas Swiss Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 cup flour (seasoned with salt and pepper)
14.5 oz. prepared diced tomatoes with juice (from a can)
10 oz. prepared mushroom gravy (from a can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the round steak into portion-sized pieces.
2. Dredge each piece in flour and brown both sides in hot oil.
3. Remove the steaks and place them in a casserole dish.
4. Top with sliced onions and mushrooms.
5. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: tomato paste, diced tomatoes, mushroom gravy, and tomato sauce.
6. Blend until smooth.
7. Pour the blended mixture over the steak, onion, and mushroom topping.
8. Bake at 350°F for 1 1/2 hours.
